# PuzzleHub

> PuzzleHub is a free, privacy-first Progressive Web App that hosts nine classic
> brain-training puzzle games. No downloads, no sign-up, no ads in the way of
> play — every game runs instantly in the browser and works offline once visited.

- Site: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/
- Language: English (UI is i18n-ready with 30+ locale packs)
- Type: Single-page application (vanilla JS, zero framework, zero build runtime)
- License: All games are free to play

## Games

Each game is a self-contained, on-demand-loaded module with multiple
difficulties, hints, undo/redo, timers, autosave, keyboard + touch controls,
and a daily seeded challenge shared by everyone.

1. Sudoku — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/sudoku
2. Crossword — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/crossword
3. Word Search — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/wordsearch
4. Cryptogram — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/cryptogram
5. Kakuro — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/kakuro
6. Nonogram — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/nonogram
7. 2048 — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/2048
8. Minesweeper — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/minesweeper
9. Memory — https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/game/memory

## How to play

Beginner-friendly rules for every game: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/how-to-play

## Key pages

- Home / all games: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/
- How to play guides: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/how-to-play
- Blog & strategy guides: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/blog
- About: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/about
- Profile & stats: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/profile
- Leaderboards: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/leaderboard
- Community / puzzle editor: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/community
- Privacy Policy: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/privacy-policy
- Contact: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/#/contact

## Notes for AI agents and crawlers

- Routing is hash-based (`#/route`). Each route still updates the document
  `<title>`, meta description, canonical URL, Open Graph tags, and emits
  JSON-LD (BreadcrumbList) for SEO and AI readability.
- The static HTML at `/` contains a fully indexable, no-JavaScript fallback
  listing every game, so the catalog is crawlable without executing scripts.
- Structured data (WebApplication, WebSite, Organization, ItemList, FAQPage) is
  embedded in the HTML `<head>` as JSON-LD.
- Sitemap: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://puzzle-hub.netlify.app/robots.txt
